server/src/image_tool/presets.py :: CompressionPreset
class CompressionPreset:
    name: str
    label: str
    description: str
    format: str
    max_mb: float
    max_longest: int | None = None
    strip_metadata: bool = True
    apply_orientation: bool = True
    filter_name: str = "none"
    post_filter: str = "none"

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, object]:
        return {
            "name": self.name,
            "label": self.label,
            "description": self.description,
            "format": self.format,
            "max_mb": self.max_mb,
            "max_longest": self.max_longest,
            "strip_metadata": self.strip_metadata,
            "apply_orientation": self.apply_orientation,
            "filter": self.filter_name,
            "post_filter": self.post_filter,
        }

server/src/image_tool/presets.py :: get_preset
def get_preset(name: str | None) -> CompressionPreset:
    normalized = str(name or "").strip().lower()
    if normalized not in PRESETS:
        available = ", ".join(sorted(PRESETS))
        raise ValueError(f"Unknown preset '{name}'. Choose one of: {available}.")
    return PRESETS[normalized]

server/src/image_tool/presets.py :: merge_edits
def merge_edits(preset: CompressionPreset, edits: EditOptions | None) -> EditOptions:
    base = edits or EditOptions()
    return EditOptions(
        crop_x=base.crop_x,
        crop_y=base.crop_y,
        crop_width=base.crop_width,
        crop_height=base.crop_height,
        resize_width=base.resize_width,
        resize_height=base.resize_height,
        filter_name=base.filter_name if base.filter_name != "none" else preset.filter_name,
        post_filter=base.post_filter if base.post_filter != "none" else preset.post_filter,
    )
